objective: Check whether the current half-wing boundary-layer route is ready for a physical SU2 grid-independence run on the real Black Cat main wing.

recommended_solver_sequence: INC_EULER or INC_NAVIER_STOKES for mesh/marker smoke only
INC_RANS with Spalart-Allmaras as the first production viscous comparison
SST or transition model only after the SA wall-resolved route is stable

half_wing_mesh_scale_guidance.note: These are engineering targets, not absolute gates. The mesh must still have valid BL topology, reasonable element quality, and stable coefficients before VSPAERO comparison is meaningful.

su2_incompressible_setup.read: SU2's incompressible solvers use INC_DENSITY_INIT, INC_VELOCITY_INIT, and INC_TEMPERATURE_INIT for initialization/non-dimensionalization; the initial state is also used by MARKER_FAR.
su2_incompressible_setup.engineering_implication: For the HPA main-wing route, INC_RANS or INC_NAVIER_STOKES with dimensional velocity and constant viscosity is the appropriate low-Mach setup family.

su2_wall_and_symmetry_bcs.read: SU2 supports incompressible no-slip heatflux walls, farfield markers, symmetry markers, turbulence inlet defaults, and wall functions.
su2_wall_and_symmetry_bcs.engineering_implication: The half-wing mesh should explicitly carry wing_wall, symmetry, and farfield markers; wall-resolved y+ near 1 should be preferred before considering wall functions.

su2_rans_and_transition.read: SU2 supports SA and SST RANS models, and LM transition can be used with RANS/INC_RANS.
su2_rans_and_transition.engineering_implication: SA is a good first robust RANS baseline, but at Re about 2e5-6e5 the final drag study should keep SST+LM transition as a follow-up because the wing is in a low-Re transitional regime.

su2_transition_tutorial.read: SU2's transition tutorial uses steady incompressible RANS with SST-2003m and Langtry-Menter transition; it notes that fully turbulent analyses do not account for transition or separation bubbles.
su2_transition_tutorial.engineering_implication: Do not over-interpret fully turbulent SA drag as final HPA drag; use it to stabilize the mesh/solver first.

nasa_tmr_grid_practice.read: NASA/TMR NACA0012 numerical grids use nested C-grid families, very fine wall spacing, farfield about 500 chords, and controlled TE spacing because TE spacing strongly affects convergence.
nasa_tmr_grid_practice.engineering_implication: The robust high-fidelity route should own C-grid/O-grid-like near-wall topology and TE/wake spacing instead of relying on late OCC/Gmsh repair around thin wing tips.

gmsh_boundary_layer_limit.read: Gmsh topological boundary layers are simple extrusions with no special fans or re-entrant corner treatment, and are available only with the built-in kernel.
gmsh_boundary_layer_limit.engineering_implication: The current OCC/Gmsh tip failure is consistent with tool limitations. For the real main wing, the safer route is mesh-native near-wall ownership or a dedicated structured/hybrid meshing topology.

section_notes: The real main-wing route is not using NACA0012.
The successful NACA0012 result in this report is only a surrogate pipeline check for half-wing symmetry and prism BL machinery.
The real route uses provider-extracted VSP sections from blackcat_004_origin.vsp3.

surrogate_half_wing_bl_mesh.engineering_read: The half-wing, symmetry, prism-BL, and million-cell machinery can run under the 12 GB target on a clean surrogate.

real_main_wing_bl_baseline_prelaunch.error: PLC Error: A segment and a facet intersect at point; boundary_layer_collapse_rate_exceeded; volume_to_wall_ratio_below_limit; boundary_layer_total_thickness_outside_target_band
real_main_wing_bl_baseline_prelaunch.engineering_read: The real VSP main wing currently fails before a volume mesh exists. This is a topology/BL-termination problem around the outboard wing and tip, not a simple mesh-density problem.

real_main_wing_stage_guard_probe.error: PLC Error: A segment and a facet intersect at point; boundary_layer_collapse_rate_exceeded; volume_to_wall_ratio_below_limit; boundary_layer_total_thickness_outside_target_band
real_main_wing_stage_guard_probe.engineering_read: The mild staged BL reduction did not resolve the real-wing topology family. Continuing to tune this one parameter would be low-value.

real_main_wing_thin_yplus_bl_probe.error: PLC Error: A segment and a facet intersect at point; boundary_layer_collapse_rate_exceeded; volume_to_wall_ratio_below_limit
real_main_wing_thin_yplus_bl_probe.engineering_read: A thin y+~1 near-wall stack reduces the clearance-pressure issue and avoids automatic tip truncation, but the same Gmsh PLC boundary-recovery family still appears. The blocker is therefore the real-wing CAD/topology path, not only BL thickness.

vsp_native_no_bl_solver_context.role: solver smoke and geometry-marker evidence only
vsp_native_no_bl_solver_context.engineering_read: The no-BL tet route has positive, flat CD after 1000 iterations, but it is not a physical drag-quality grid for this low-Re wing.

engineering_decision.reason: A real main-wing boundary-layer volume mesh is not generated yet. Thick, staged, and thin y+~1 BL probes all fail in the same Gmsh boundary-recovery/PLC family. A 2000-iteration SU2 run on the no-BL tetra route would test solver stability, not physical grid independence.

mesh_quality_status.surrogate_bl_mesh: good enough to prove machinery and memory scale
mesh_quality_status.real_main_wing_bl_mesh: not available because BL topology fails before volume meshing
mesh_quality_status.vsp_native_no_bl_mesh: valid for smoke, not final CFD quality

next_actions.action: Switch the next implementation slice to mesh-native near-wall topology, not more OCC/Gmsh repair.
next_actions.details: Create an indexed C-grid/O-grid-like half-wing near-wall block from the VSP airfoil sections, with explicit chord/span/radial ownership, TE/wake spacing, root symmetry, and tip closure. Then either write SU2 prism/hexa connectivity directly or hand only the outer block to Gmsh for tet fill.

next_actions.action: Keep real VSP airfoils in the route.
next_actions.details: Use the VSP embedded FX 76-MP-140 and CLARK-Y smoothed coordinates; the NACA surrogate should stay a pipeline-only fixture.

next_actions.action: After the real BL mesh exists, run half-wing INC_RANS SA at 2000 iterations.
next_actions.details: Use wall-resolved y+ near 1, symmetry marker on the root plane, farfield outer boundary, and half-wing reference-area convention.

next_actions.action: Run coarse/medium/fine grid independence under the 12 GB RAM cap.
next_actions.details: Start around 0.9M, 1.8M, and 3.0M half-wing cells if quality and memory allow. Select the cheapest mesh with CL/CD/Cm changes within the engineering tolerance band, then compare to VSPAERO only as the final sanity check.

source_notes: SU2 supports marker-based symmetry, wall, farfield, incompressible RANS setups, and transition-model options.
Gmsh supports boundary-layer extrusion, but the current real-wing failure is a topological PLC/boundary recovery failure before SU2 can be launched.

NASA TMR-style airfoil validation practice supports wall-resolved, nested C-grid/O-grid thinking and careful TE spacing; this project still needs a valid real-wing BL mesh before applying that solver standard.
